title: Aapadbandhavudu

title: Priyamaina Neeku
subTitle: Ganesh (Tarun) is a carefree college youth from Hyderabad (Tamil Version as Coimbatore), whose life revolves around friends and doing good deeds for them which upsets his father Raja Shekar (Tanikella Bharani)/(Tamil Version as Pyramid Natarajan). One day he fumbles upon a Red diary in his father's auction shop. It is a diary left behind unknowingly by Sandhya (Sneha).

subTitle: Gudumba Shankar falls in love with Gowri and finds out that she is being forced to marry Kumar Swamy, a gangster. Shankar must find a way to stop him and save Gowri.

title: Naa Alludu
subTitle: Karthik, a young man, applies for a job but gets rejected by Bhanumathi even though he is qualified for it. As a result, he holds a grudge against her and decides to marry her daughter.

title: Yamajathakudu
subTitle: Just as Sivaji, a shrewd lawyer, decides to change his ways, he is killed and ends up in hell. Here he learns that he still has eleven days to live, so he asks Yama to send him back.

subTitle: After losing his mother at a young age, Prem looks for love in every woman he meets. However, when true love knocks on his door, it comes with its own set of challenges.

subTitle: Karna, Malli, and Chandu are close friends with Santosh, a politician's son. Santosh falls for the daughter of a rival family and seeks help from his friends, who make sacrifices for his sake.

title: Collector Gari Bharya
subTitle: A career-driven woman gets married to a man who wants her to be a full-time housewife. However, dissatisfied with marital life, she takes the help of a friend to fulfill her dreams.

subTitle: Ajay, a fearless Kabaddi player, rescues Swapna from the ruthless Obul Reddy, who is obsessed with marrying her. Subsequently, Ajay stands his ground when he pursues them.

subTitle: Balaji thinks men can do everything as they are supposed to be the head of the family and earn for them. But he realises his mistake when he loses his job and his wife has to work.

title: Bobbili Simham
subTitle: During a boat accident, Rayudu rescues Vijaya instead of his son. Years later, when Vijaya is about to be appointed as the next heir of Bobbili, an evil man challenges Vijaya to a fight.

title: Reporter
subTitle: Thaiyal Nayagi tries to protect her niece from an online predator. However, things escalate when the FBI's attempt to catch the culprit puts them both in danger as they unwittingly become bait.
